news.title:
Kalpataru's subsidiary Fasttel Engenharia seeks judicial reorganization in Brazil under Lei n 11.101/2005.
No change in Fasttel's shareholding; financial impact assessment is underway by Kalpataru.
news.summary:
Kalpataru's subsidiary Fasttel Engenharia seeks judicial reorganization in Brazil under Lei n 11.101/2005.
No change in Fasttel's shareholding; financial impact assessment is underway by Kalpataru.

news.title:
Kalpataru fined INR 1.87 cr in UAE for Emiratization non-compliance.
Loan prepaid for Brazilian unit; Indian tax penalty of INR 1.80 cr challenged.
news.summary:
Kalpataru fined INR 1.87 cr in UAE for Emiratization non-compliance.
Loan prepaid for Brazilian unit; Indian tax penalty of INR 1.80 cr challenged.

news.title:
Kalpataru Projects Intl. acquires 35% stake in KIOCL, making it a wholly owned subsidiary.
Acquisition strengthens presence in Saudi Arabia; deal worth SAR 10M, completion by May 2026.
news.summary:
Kalpataru Projects Intl. acquires 35% stake in KIOCL, making it a wholly owned subsidiary.
Acquisition strengthens presence in Saudi Arabia; deal worth SAR 10M, completion by May 2026.

news.title:
Kalpataru Projects to acquire remaining 35% stake in Kalpataru IBN Omairah for SAR 10M.
The deal with BIN Omairah Contracting is set for February 23, 2026.
news.summary:
Kalpataru Projects to acquire remaining 35% stake in Kalpataru IBN Omairah for SAR 10M.
The deal with BIN Omairah Contracting is set for February 23, 2026.

news.title:
Kalpataru Projects International confirms Rs. 150 Cr CP redemption on Feb 11, 2026.
ISIN INE220B14BO6 maturity payment aligns with SEBI guidelines; records updated.
news.summary:
Kalpataru Projects International confirms Rs. 150 Cr CP redemption on Feb 11, 2026.
ISIN INE220B14BO6 maturity payment aligns with SEBI guidelines; records updated.

news.title: Kalpataru Projects International targets 25% revenue growth with Rs 63,287 crore order book for FY26.
news.summary: Kalpataru Projects International targets 25% revenue growth with Rs 63,287 crore order book for FY26.

news.title:
Kalpataru Projects confirms no deviation in utilization of NCD proceeds for Q4 FY25, as per SEBI regulations.
The statement specifies compliance with SEBI Master Circular and Listing Obligations guidelines.
news.summary:
Kalpataru Projects confirms no deviation in utilization of NCD proceeds for Q4 FY25, as per SEBI regulations.
The statement specifies compliance with SEBI Master Circular and Listing Obligations guidelines.

news.title: Kalpataru Projects Intl reports Q3 net profit of 1.52B INR, up from 1.42B YoY.
news.summary: Kalpataru Projects Intl reports Q3 net profit of 1.52B INR, up from 1.42B YoY.

news.title:
Kalpataru Projects' board meeting is scheduled for 4th Feb 2026 to review Q3 FY26 results.
Trading window remains closed, reopening 48 hours post-results; Analyst call on 5th Feb 2026.
news.summary:
Kalpataru Projects' board meeting is scheduled for 4th Feb 2026 to review Q3 FY26 results.
Trading window remains closed, reopening 48 hours post-results; Analyst call on 5th Feb 2026.

news.title:
Kalpataru Projects received favorable tax tribunal orders for AY 2013-14 to 2020-21.
Tax disallowances deleted, reducing or eliminating tax demands; orders received on Jan 24-27, 2026.
news.summary:
Kalpataru Projects received favorable tax tribunal orders for AY 2013-14 to 2020-21.
Tax disallowances deleted, reducing or eliminating tax demands; orders received on Jan 24-27, 2026.

news.title:
Kalpataru sold 100% stake in VEPL, a 4-lane, 89.3 km toll road project.
Sale to Actis valued at Rs. 775 crore; aligns with core business focus.
news.summary:
Kalpataru sold 100% stake in VEPL, a 4-lane, 89.3 km toll road project.
Sale to Actis valued at Rs. 775 crore; aligns with core business focus.

news.title:
Kalpataru Projects to sell 100% stake in Vindhyachal Expressway to Actis Atlantic Holdings; deal signed on 9 Oct 2024.
Sale expected to close by 31 Jan 2026; subsidiary contributes Rs.85 Cr, 0.43% of consolidated revenue.
news.summary:
Kalpataru Projects to sell 100% stake in Vindhyachal Expressway to Actis Atlantic Holdings; deal signed on 9 Oct 2024.
Sale expected to close by 31 Jan 2026; subsidiary contributes Rs.85 Cr, 0.43% of consolidated revenue.

news.title:
Kalpataru Projects (KPIL) secured new orders worth ₹719 Cr, including an elevated metro rail project in Thane.
KPIL's MD stated the orders reinforce its position in urban infra, with a strong order book and global presence in 75 countries.
news.summary:
Kalpataru Projects (KPIL) secured new orders worth ₹719 Cr, including an elevated metro rail project in Thane.
KPIL's MD stated the orders reinforce its position in urban infra, with a strong order book and global presence in 75 countries.

news.title:
Kalpataru Projects Intl received ITAT relief for AY 2013-14 to 2015-16, 2017-18 with tax demand reduced to NIL.
For AY 2019-20, tax demand of Rs. 81.5 Cr set aside; eligible for Rs. 7.3 Cr refund.
news.summary:
Kalpataru Projects Intl received ITAT relief for AY 2013-14 to 2015-16, 2017-18 with tax demand reduced to NIL.
For AY 2019-20, tax demand of Rs. 81.5 Cr set aside; eligible for Rs. 7.3 Cr refund.

news.title:
Kalpataru Projects paid a penalty of INR 20.67 lakh to Gujarat Industrial Development Corp for updated building plan approval.
The penalty has no significant financial or operational impact on the company, as disclosed under Regulation 30.
news.summary:
Kalpataru Projects paid a penalty of INR 20.67 lakh to Gujarat Industrial Development Corp for updated building plan approval.
The penalty has no significant financial or operational impact on the company, as disclosed under Regulation 30.

news.title: Kalpataru Projects International's UAE branch fined AED 284,000 by regulators.
news.summary: Kalpataru Projects International's UAE branch fined AED 284,000 by regulators.

news.title:
Kalpataru Projects JV secures approval for Thane Metro Rail Project.
Kalpataru holds 60% stake, while H.G. Infra owns 40% in the JV.
news.summary:
Kalpataru Projects JV secures approval for Thane Metro Rail Project.
Kalpataru holds 60% stake, while H.G. Infra owns 40% in the JV.

news.title:
Kalpataru Projects received Rs. 2,003 Cr orders in Buildings & Factories.
Orders include Power Transmission & Distribution projects in India and overseas.
news.summary:
Kalpataru Projects received Rs. 2,003 Cr orders in Buildings & Factories.
Orders include Power Transmission & Distribution projects in India and overseas.

news.title:
Kalpataru Projects International Ltd (KPIL) secures new orders worth ₹2,003 crore in T&D and B&F sectors.
These orders boost KPIL's YTD order intake to ₹17,000 crore, enhancing growth visibility for upcoming quarters.
news.summary:
Kalpataru Projects International Ltd (KPIL) secures new orders worth ₹2,003 crore in T&D and B&F sectors.
These orders boost KPIL's YTD order intake to ₹17,000 crore, enhancing growth visibility for upcoming quarters.

news.title:
GIDC imposed a non-use penalty of INR 2.12 crore on Kalpataru Projects.
Penalty reduced to INR 0.44 crore, later waived to zero after protests.
news.summary:
GIDC imposed a non-use penalty of INR 2.12 crore on Kalpataru Projects.
Penalty reduced to INR 0.44 crore, later waived to zero after protests.
